mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model (datasource_id, database_id, table_name, display_name, description, is_visible, primary_key, properties) VALUES (#{datasourceId}, #{databaseId}, #{tableName}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{isVisible}, #{primaryKey}, #{properties})

INSERT INTO model (datasource_id, database_id, table_name, display_name, description, is_visible, primary_key, properties) VALUES
(#{item.datasourceId}, #{item.databaseId}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.displayName}, #{item.description}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.primaryKey}, #{item.properties})
mapper.update: UPDATE model SET datasource_id = #{datasourceId}, database_id = #{databaseId}, table_name = #{tableName}, display_name = #{displayName}, description = #{description}, is_visible = #{isVisible}, primary_key = #{primaryKey}, properties = #{properties} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM model ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM model WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM model WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId} AND table_name = #{tableName}
SELECT * FROM model WHERE is_visible = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM model WHERE updated_at > #{updatedAfter} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
SELECT * FROM model ORDER BY created_at DESC
